name: Vero
description: Vero — Event-driven email marketing automation platform for sending personalized lifecycle campaigns.

seo.title: Vero — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Vero: Vero — Event-driven email marketing automation platform for sending personalized lifecycle campaigns.

when_to_use: Event-driven lifecycle email triggered by in-product actions
Personalized onboarding drip based on user behavior events
Re-engagement campaign targeting users who dropped off
Behavioral email automation synced via Vero's event API
Transactional + lifecycle emails from a unified event-driven platform

pros: Event-driven model fits SaaS lifecycle use cases
Workflows map cleanly to product events
cons: Smaller than Customer.io or Braze in mindshare
Feature velocity slower than top competitors
review.verdict: Reliable event-driven email for SaaS teams; Customer.io usually wins head-to-heads on features.
review.best_for: SaaS product teams sending behavioral lifecycle emails
review.not_for: Brands needing multi-channel orchestration and SMS
